name: 自定义下拉框认证
description: 适用于使用自定义 div/span 下拉框（非原生 <select>）选择运营商的校园网认证页面。先点击触发器展开列表，再按文字匹配点击选项。

steps.script: (() => { window.__authState = { url: location.href, title: document.title, bodyLen: (document.body.innerText || '').length }; return true; })()

steps.description: 自动勾选服务协议（如有）
steps.script: (() => { const cbs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=checkbox]')).filter(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width < 4 || r.height < 4) return false; if (el.checked) return false; const ctx = [el.name, el.id, el.value, el.labels && el.labels[0] && el.labels[0].innerText, el.parentElement && el.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); return /协议|同意|条款|已读|agree|accept|terms/.test(ctx); }); if (cbs.length > 0) { cbs[0].click(); } return true; })()

(() => { const val = ({{username}} || '').trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('账号为空'); const vis = el => { if (!el) return false; const s = getComputedStyle(el); if (!s || s.display==='none' || s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>2 && r.height>2; }; const ok = el => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const ctx = el => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels&&el.labels[0]&&el.labels[0].innerText, el.closest('label')&&el.closest('label').innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = el => { const t = String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (t==='text'||t==='email'||t==='tel'||t==='') s+=5; if (t==='password'||t==='hidden') s-=30; const c = ctx(el); if (/账号|帐号|用户名|使用者|学号|工号|教职工|手机号|手机|user.?name|login.?id|account|userid|student/i.test(c)) s+=20; if (/密码|pass|验证码|code|captcha|sms/i.test(c)) s-=12; if (el.closest('[class*=login]')||el.closest('[id*=login]')) s+=3; if (el.autocomplete==='username'||el.autocomplete==='email') s+=5; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea')).filter(el=>vis(el)&&ok(el)); const pick = all.slice().sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a))[0]; if (!pick||score(pick)<1) throw new Error('未识别到账号输入框'); const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set; nativeSet.call(pick,val); pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true; })()

(() => { const val = ({{password}} || '').trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('密码为空'); const vis = el => { if (!el) return false; const s = getComputedStyle(el); if (!s || s.display==='none' || s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>2 && r.height>2; }; const ok = el => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const ctx = el => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className, el.labels&&el.labels[0]&&el.labels[0].innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = el => { const t = String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); let s = 0; if (t==='password') s+=30; const c = ctx(el); if (/密码|pass|passwd|pwd|口令/i.test(c)) s+=16; if (/账号|用户名|user|account/i.test(c)) s-=10; if (/确认|confirm|repeat|再次/i.test(c)) s-=20; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea')).filter(el=>vis(el)&&ok(el)); const pick = all.slice().sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a))[0]; if (!pick||score(pick)<1) throw new Error('未识别到密码输入框'); const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set; nativeSet.call(pick,val); pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); pick.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true; })()

steps.description: 选择运营商（点击式自定义下拉框）

steps.script: (() => { const vis = el => { if(!el) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); if(!s||s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>4&&r.height>4; }; const txt = el => String(el.innerText||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').trim(); const score = el => { const t=txt(el); let s=0; if (/^登录$|^登入$|^用户登录$|^账号登录$|^网络登录$|^上网登录$/.test(t)) s+=50; if (/登录|登入|认证|连接|上网|联网|确定|提交|submit|login|sign.?in/i.test(t)) s+=20; if (/扫码|二维码|短信|微信|支付宝|qq|微博/i.test(t)) s-=30; if (/重置|取消|清空|退出|返回|注册|忘记|forgot|reset|cancel/i.test(t)) s-=20; const tp=String(el.type||'').toLowerCase(); if (tp==='submit') s+=8; if (tp==='button') s+=3; if (el.tagName==='A'&&el.href&&/#|javascript/.test(el.href)) s-=5; return s; }; const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=submit],input[type=button],a[role=button],div[role=button],[class*=btn],[class*=submit]')).filter(vis); const pick = all.slice().sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a))[0]; if(!pick||score(pick)<8) throw new Error('未找到登录按钮'); pick.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const s = window.__authState || {}; const urlNow = location.href; const titleNow = document.title; const bodyNow = (document.body.innerText || ''); const bodyLen = bodyNow.length; const t = (bodyNow + ' ' + titleNow).toLowerCase(); const urlChanged = urlNow !== (s.url || ''); if (urlChanged) return true; if (Math.abs(bodyLen - (s.bodyLen || 0)) > 200) return true; const fail = ['密码错误','密码不正确','密码有误','密码过期','账号错误','账号不存在','账号已欠费','账号已停机','账号被禁用','账号或密码','用户名或密码','用户不存在','认证失败','登录失败','登入失败','操作失败','请重新登录','error','failed','invalid','incorrect','disabled','expired','suspended','forbidden']; for (const w of fail) { if (t.includes(w.toLowerCase())) return false; } const ok = ['登录成功','认证成功','已连接','已上线','已认证','欢迎','在线','success','connected','welcome','online','logout','注销','退出登录','断开']; if (ok.some(w => t.toLowerCase().includes(w.toLowerCase()))) return true; const alertEl = document.querySelector('.alert-success,.msg-success,[class*=success],[class*=ok]'); if (alertEl && alertEl.offsetParent) return true; return false; })()

on_failure.message: 登录失败，请检查账号密码或认证地址。如运营商是原生 <select> 下拉框，请尝试「原生下拉框认证」任务。
